entry.title: Re: NC Disposition via SAPME PAPI: Find Disposition Options
entry.content: Hello Andrew, thanks for the answer. The usage of the NC priority is our current workaround. For a permanent solution we plan to use the Read NC Code request to get the right disposition option instead of the find disposition request.

Margit

entry.title: Re: Build process on webide fails: Error occured during c...
entry.content:
I previously had a similar error and what worked for me was to change the host name (etc/hosts) from hxehost.mydomain to just hxehost and to use hxehost as the host name when prompted in the binary install of SAP HANA, express edition.
Hope that helps,
Dan

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database import to pgAdmin with SSH Tunnel (Local Access)
entry.content: @satish_kumar_kara First of all, sorry for the late reply. Can you make sure that you successfully connect to Cloud Foundry with 'cf login' and select space? Sometimes, it could be a problem to login with 'cf login'. In such circumstances, you can try to change your BTP account password then you can login with 'cf login' again. This password-changing process generally fixes this problem.

entry.title: Re: Create scales By BOI I_PurchasingInfoRecordTP
entry.content:
Hello,

Manage Purchasing Info Records does not contain all the features/functionalities that is found in webgui tiles.

As you could see in the Fiori library, you can create info records for the different item category types and scales are not supported.

For more information you can refer to the below link:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/manage-purchasing-info-record-does-not-display-scales-information-for/qaq-p/12557318

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: List of all 50 Open content network providers for Successfcators Leraning required

entry.title: Re: MDK Application not showing two date picker control s...
entry.content:
@Sourabh1 

Supporting Multiple Columns in a Form Cell Section is applicable on MDK mobile clients only, not web.

Please note below behavior of the NumberOfColumns property

  • On iOS, this setting is only valid in regular mode (iPad or large iPhone Landscape). In compact mode it will always be set to 1 column.
  • On Android, this setting is only valid when current screen width is larger than 600dp. When the current screen width (e.g. in phone portrait mode) is less than 600dp, it will always be set to 1 column.

What you see in the Page editor of the Business Application Studio is a graphical representation of how the UI may look on clients.What you see on the Web and Android is the expected behavior as described above.

entry.title: Re: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it via OData (for PDF Viewer Functionality)
entry.content: I don't see any apparent problem in your code. I advise to debug the code and check what can go wrong at each step, e.g. download EV_PDF_XSTRING to your laptop as .pdf file and check if you can display it. You may create a little test program on your development system and see what happens with an OTF spool.

entry.title: Re: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it...
entry.content: Consider using CONVERT_OTFSPOOLJOB_2_PDF followed by SCMS _XSTRING_TO_BINARY to convert the XSTRING  BIN_FILE to binary.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database import to pgAdmin with SSH Tunnel (Local Access)
entry.content: @Vivek2k24 If you successfully see this screen below before step 7, you should connect the database from pgAdmin. Please note that this screen should be kept open while you access the database from pgAdmin. Your problem seems like the tunnel is not opened properly.

entry.title: ABAP Development Tools - News and Roadmap
entry.content:
In this session, learn the latest developments regarding ABAP Development Tools ranging from the ADT actions framework that let’s you extend your development environment with custom actions over new design options and an outlook on our future IDE strategy.

Speaker: Thomas Alexander Ritter

entry.title: Re: What is LUW? How LUW works? Different types of LUW?
entry.content:
Overview of SAP LUW, Database LUW, and RAP LUW

SAP Logical Unit of Work (LUW):

  • Concept: An SAP LUW is a set of database operations executed between two points in an ABAP program. The main goal is to ensure data consistency. An SAP LUW can span multiple database LUWs, meaning it can involve multiple database transactions if the database operations are logically connected.
  • Example: Suppose you update customer records and then update related sales orders. Both operations are executed together, ensuring either all or none of the operations are committed, thus maintaining data consistency across both tables.

Database Logical Unit of Work (Database LUW):

  • Concept: A database LUW represents a single database transaction. It begins with an open database operation and ends with a COMMIT or ROLLBACK. Each database LUW is managed by the database system independently.
  • Example: Updating a single row in a database table, followed by a COMMIT. If something fails during this update, you can ROLLBACK to undo the transaction.

RAP Logical Unit of Work (RAP LUW):

  • Concept: RAP LUW is used within the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP). It handles data consistency within RAP-based applications, ensuring that all database changes within a RAP transaction are consistent. RAP LUWs are a part of the transaction management framework specific to RAP.
  • Example: In an OData service implementation using RAP, an update operation across multiple entities is grouped as a RAP LUW. If an error occurs, the entire RAP LUW can be rolled back, ensuring the data remains consistent.

Differentiation and Similarities

  • Differentiation:
    • Scope: Database LUW is a lower-level concept focused on a single database transaction, whereas SAP LUW can encompass multiple database LUWs, and RAP LUW is specific to RAP scenarios.
    • Usage Context: Database LUWs are relevant in traditional ABAP programming, SAP LUWs are used for broader transaction handling, and RAP LUWs are tailored for RAP applications with OData services.
  • Similarities:
    • All three concepts ensure data consistency and integrity, whether at the database level, SAP program level, or RAP service level.

entry.title: Re: BPA Automation doesnt stop running,
entry.content:
Hi,
Is automation getting triggered? if not can you configured your agent as per following : Unattended Mode setup
Add that attribute to your automation and release and deploy your project again and try again.

entry.title: OData V4 Annotation URI For SWFVISU
entry.content:
For Odata V2 , we simply add the following URI in swfvisu.

/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='Z_CUSTOM_VAN',Version='0001')/$value/

However, for Odata V4, my understanding is that all annotations resides in $metadata file. So , how to use it in swfvisu parameter?

Check this link https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-annotation-file-in-odata-v4-how-can-we-query-it/qaq-p/12745918  but unable to understand.

entry.title: Customer Business Partner Change Log History Query
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help to improve my Query to show SAP User Code and Name who Create Customer BP and SAP User and Name who Updated BP, thanks!

SELECT T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], T2.[GroupName],T3.[PymntGroup], T0.[CreateDate], T1.[UpdateDate], T1.[CardName], T1.[GroupCode], T1.[GroupNum], T1.[Currency], T1.[CntctPrsn], T1.[Building], T1.[Cellular], T1.[VatGroup], T1.[BankCode], T1.[BankCtlKey], T1.[DebPayAcct], T0.[OwnerCode], T1.[RepName], T1.[IsDomestic], T1.[IsResident], T1.[OwnerCode], T1.[MandateID], T1.[SignDate], T1.[RepFName], T1.[RepSName] FROM [dbo].[OCRD] T0 INNER JOIN [dbo].[ACRD] T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] INNER JOIN OCRG T2 ON T0.[GroupCode] = T2.[GroupCode] INNER JOIN OCTG T3 ON T0.[GroupNum] = T3.[GroupNum] WHERE T0.[CardCode] =[%0]

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hello, this is my solution.

Preview the App showing all the columns, search and filter options in the CDS view entity.

Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field.

entry.title: Quick Start: Build a GenAI Apps on SAP BTP in Minutes with GenAI Starter Kit! 💎
entry.content:
💫Join us for a dynamic live stream where we demonstrate how to kickstart your journey in building GenAI-powered apps on SAP BTP in just minutes.

Using the BTP GenAI Starter Kit, we'll simplify the setup of critical infrastructure components like SAP AI Core Service and SAP HANA Cloud.

Additionally, we'll provide a comprehensive overview of how to leverage BTP to implement Retrieval Augmented Generation applications, along with techniques to enhance results tailored to your use case. Don't miss this opportunity! 📢

entry.title: Re: can Datasphere create temporal joins
entry.content:
Hi @glen_spalding 

Only in a SQL View.

Graphical views only support equi-joins and cross-joins.

Regards,

entry.title: 🟢 SAP Forms by Adobe
entry.content:
Find out how to make the most of print forms and interactive forms using SAP Forms service by Adobe in the cloud and SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe on-premise. We explain the overall strategy, key functions and benefits, continuous improvements and options for the cloud. We will also give an update about the local deployment option based on XSA, the SAP HANA Extended Application Services, Advanced Version.

Speakers: Peter Barker and Sandra Thimme

entry.title: Re: BPA Automation doesnt stop running,
entry.content: Business Process Automation (BPA) streamlines and automates complex business processes to improve efficiency, reduce errors, and save time. By leveraging BPA, organizations can automate repetitive tasks such as data entry, invoicing, and customer service workflows, allowing employees to focus on more strategic activities. BPA tools integrate with existing systems to ensure seamless operations across different departments, enhancing productivity and consistency. Additionally, BPA helps in reducing operational costs and improving compliance by ensuring processes are followed consistently and accurately. As businesses increasingly adopt digital transformation strategies, BPA automation becomes essential for staying competitive and agile in a dynamic marketplace.

entry.title: How to identify the exact SQL query sent to source system?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a loading process that is not working as expected. It has been done as many other processes are working correctly, but this one is not.

The problem is that in the Data Monitoring, in the Remote Queries section, the parameterised SQL statement is shown. This is 

 

 

SELECT ... FROM ... where "_load_date" > CAST( ? AS TIMESTAMP)

 

 

,  where the ? will be replaced by a timestsamp which is calculated in a table function SQL view.

While I can know the calculated TIMESTAMP, I don't see the one that is actually sent to the data source, and it looks like something is wrong with that, since I'm getting data that doesn't match the where filter.

I haven't seen any way to know what time stamp was sent in the where, neither in the monitoring, nor in the data flow logs, which makes me totally lost and the process out of control.

Does anyone have any idea where I could find it?

Thanks.

XP

entry.title: Re: Minimum required SAP Kernel Patchlevel for SLES 15 (S...
entry.content:
There isn't because SAP doesn't releases KERNEL software for SLES but for LINUX.  SAP supports various LINUX flavors like SLES, RHEL and ORACLE LINUX.

For standard systems (not S/4HANA) there are only 3 KERNEL versions currently maintained by SAP: 7.22, 7.53 and 7.54. It's easy to go through each one release notes and find the information you need. But I would say that for SLES 15 (SP6) the one to go is 7.54 (no brainer...)

entry.title: Bookkeeping Act Denmark
entry.content:
Hello together,

i hope, you can help me 😞

There are various concerns from our danish company, that SAP ERP will not be able to map this (Bookkeeping Act for Denmark)? Is that right?

Can you tell me, which sap notes are relevant for this topic? Or how, we can solve this with SAP ERP?

 

I have this information: 

1 January 2025: Digital bookkeeping must be implemented for companies that are required to submit their annual report and are using a specially developed bookkeeping system

 

Thank you very much for your support.

Best regards,

L. E.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @geek ,

This is how I do it. I have 2 fields Status which has technical key and StatusText which has corresponding values. For the Status field add this annotation:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: '/DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH',element: 'OverallStatus' } }]
@ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'StatusText' ]
@UI.textArrangement: #TEXT_ONLY

and hide the StatusText field as anyway the Text value will be displayed under Status

entry.title: Re: Process automation Integration with microsoft graph
entry.content: can you share your destination configuration?

entry.title: Re: Process automation Integration with microsoft graph

entry.title: Re: Move/sort Story Filters
entry.content: Hello Stefan

entry.title: Re: Move/sort Story Filters
entry.content: Hello Stefan and others, you can change the order of the filters by doing the following : Open the left side panel (under View), then go to Outline. Select the Filter Panel under Story/Global Settings, then change the filter order from Default to Custom order. You'll then be able to adjust the order of filters. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone 

yesterday, we changed the odata with the option "Replace Odata" but when i change in the adaptation project.

the application continue look for the firts entity of the standard odata.

the app is F3302, The entity is C_GRIRAccountReconciliation.

how must to do?

In the adaptation project there are two options, add or replace the odata, we chose the second option, however it seems that the main entity is always called or there is something missing in SAPUI5 Project.

thank you for your helping.

entry.title: Re: FIORI migration to SAPUI5 with BAS
entry.content:
did you try this SIT_RUSES1?

but what you are doing doesn't sound good.

entry.title: Re: SAP business one application messaging service
entry.content:
The SAP B1 messaging service is on starting mode. Stop the service using the CMD command.

Go to Start, type CMD, a black screen will pop up then type:

Taskkill / PID number /F

 

And the service will forcefully be closed. Once that is done, go back to service manager, refresh and restart the service.

entry.title: Re: How to identify the exact SQL query sent to source system?
entry.content: Database level SQL trace?

entry.title: Disabling Advanced Planning-Relevant MRP Area
entry.content:
How can you delete an MRP area assigned to an Advanced Planning Relevant Material? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to identify the exact SQL query sent to source system?
entry.content:
Thanks @JimSpath, but we work with remote systems that we can't always have that level of access, and if we can it could take days.
Ideally, I would like to be able to see it in the DSP or in the HANA Cockpit.

entry.title: Re: Disabling Advanced Planning-Relevant MRP Area
entry.content:
This information is available in the following SAP Official Documentation: 
SAP Help Portal - Disabling Advanced Planning-Relevant Material Creation 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f899ce30af9044299d573ea30b533f1c/fac08b402d5b46a3a71fc5b4091f210e.html?locale=en-US

"An MRP area assigned to a material which is marked as Advanced Planning relevant is also automatically classified as Advanced Planning relevant.

It is not possible to phase out a single MRP area from PP/DS Planning by changing the planning status to Marked for deactivation. An MRP area can only have the Marked for Deletion status.

To do this, you can select the deletion indicator on the header screen area for MRP data maintenance in material master data.

This indicator can only be set after the MRP area has got a planning status Marked for deactivation assigned on the Advanced Planning tab and the Where-Used-Check (WUC) functionality has determined that the MRP area is not used anymore in any PP/DS planning object. If no references are found, the deletion indicator field checkbox can be selected. This WUC functionality can be triggered from the MRP Maintenance UI screens in the material master data maintenance.

(...)

Set Deletion Indicator for MRP areas

To set the deletion indicator for an MRP area assigned to a material with Advanced Planning indicator, proceed with the following steps:

  1. Call up the MM02 transaction for the material in plant to which the MRP area is assigned.

  2. Choose MRP1 tab to view the MRP area maintenance screen.

  3. Select the Advanced Planning tab and swap the planning status from Active for Planning to Marked for Deactivation. Choose Save to save your changes.

  4. Call up MM02 transaction again and navigate to the MRP area maintenance screens.

  5. Choose the Advanced Planning tab and choose the Where-Used Check button to trigger the reference check. (If the system finds an object where the product or location is being used, then it will not allow you to set the deletion indicator)

  6. If you find references to any object, use the report /SAPAPO/PPDS_PPSKZ_RESET to get details about the references and remove them from the system.

  7. If there are no references found, you can set the deletion indicator that is enabled on the header area of the MRP area data maintenance UI screen.

  8. Choose Save.

Phase Out Material and MRP Areas from PP/DS Planning

Setting the deletion indicator at the MRP area level does not remove the location or product from PP/DS. You must perform the following steps at the material or plant level to remove the Advanced Planning indicator from a single material with all assigned MRP areas in a plant:

  1. Call up transaction MM02 for material in plant. Select Advanced Planning tab and swap planning status from Active for Planning to Marked for deactivation. Save your changes.

  2. Choose MRP1 tab to view the MRP area maintenance screen.

  3. Select the Advanced Planning tab and swap the planning status from Active for Planningto Marked for Deactivation. Choose Save to save your changes.

  4. Call up MM02 transaction again and navigate to the Advanced Planning tab.

  5. Choose the Where-Used Check button to trigger the reference check. (If the system finds an object where the product or location is being used, it will not allow you to remove the Advanced Planning indicator)

  6. If you find references to any object, use the report /SAPAPO/PPDS_PPSKZ_RESET to get details about the references and remove them from the system.

  7. If there are no references found, you can remove the Advanced Planning indicator.

  8. Choose Save."

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
Thank you for the reply ArnoBrouwer,

I'm not sure why I can't comment directly to you. I think marking them delete would work. And then creating them again.  I think we would have to use different numbers. Then all the historical data based around that material -- we couldn't link it with the new material. (To my knowledge)   I guess the question is do you know how to link the two materials so the historical data would not be lost?   I believe all the transactional data that would have to be changed.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content: Does this mean that the adaptation project will always call the entities of the same standard, even though a copy of the FAC_GRIR_RECONCILIATION odata is made? Therefore, we must use the metadata extension since I have ABAP code within the SEGW in the Odata Z that I created as a copy of the standard? What would be the suggestion?

entry.title: How to use USHELL API in SAP WORKZONE
entry.content:
Im developing a UI Integration Card in SAP WORKZONE Adv. version.

There seem to be two following issues, and if anyone knows well, please help.

1. Creating an app using a smart table on my card. In that app, I want to use use VariantManagement to provide Variant Storage.. VariantManagement doesn't work.

It works well if you make it into a UI5 freestyle app and deploy it, but it doesn't work on Workzone Card.

2. On the card, when you try to use sap.ushell.container (SHELL API), an error occurs. When you check from the console, there is no sap.ushell.container object on the Workzone Card.

The above two causes are assumed to exist in a different context than Workzone Shell because the workzone card is serviced in the form of iframe, and therefore the varaint personalization and the husell API cannot be used because of the lack of access to the husell service.

Accordingly, is there any other way to use USHELL?

Additionally, I found someone with a similar problem to me, and this person seems to be calling the API with postMessage

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-tenant-cap-application-integration-in-build-work-zone-via-iframe/ba-p/13562133

Is there any other way other than that?
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition 
@

entry.title: Service Cloud: Possible to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate?
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I want to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate with it. Is this possible or not?

My business scenario is: I want to check wheater the SLA of a ticket is fulfilled or not. Therefore I want to subtract the fields 'Initial Review due' with 'Initial Review completed'. If it is a positive value, it was fulfilled. If it is a negative value, it was not fulfilled (show it in red, if possible).

I currently dont see an option to convert the characteristic into key figure in order to calculate. 

But hopefully, I am wrong... 
Can anybody help?

Best reagds,
Deborah

#C4C #servicecloud #report # reporting #calculate #characteristic #keyfigure

entry.title: Deleting Business Users
entry.content:
1) Need to delete all users data permanently from Test system. Please suggest us how to delete all business users?

2) Need to import new business users in Test system. Please suggest us how to upload users in Manage workforce tile?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Fixed Asset Master data and capitalization for the de...
entry.content: That's it, Yang. You'll use the FA Master Entry for the depreciation from now on, but use a JE just to adjust the Balance Sheet with the past information that you want to be able to see in future accounting reports.

entry.title: Re: Deleting Business Users
entry.content:
1. If the employee was created by replication from SAP SuccessFactors, it is not necessary to first delete the employee in SAP SuccessFactors and replicate the deletion. You need to follow these steps if an inconsistency was found on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or ask an SAP Product Support engineer for assistance.

There are 3 sets of data, work assignment, business partner and business user. To delete all these data, there are corresponding ILM objects for which a few configurations are required. These configuration details can be found in SAP Help Portal Data Management for HR Connectivity and Workforce Details | SAP Help Portal.

2. Kindly follow the SAP Help Portal How to Import Worker Data | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud / Cloud for Customer – 2408 Release Briefing Webcast
entry.content:
Info was published 03.August

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/4ca099b3968e4b1d8201e98bc0b96edc/2cc41ede13a84e37beee841d5e849a52.html?locale=en-US&parentHref=%2Fwhats-new%2F535093a0991548c98d675e0299ecfb31%3Fq%3Dmashup%26locale%3Den-US&parentName=What%27s%20New%20in%20SAP%20Cloud%20for%20Customer

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content: you have to enhance the service, not copy it.

entry.title: Is there any tool like SAP DART for public cloud?
entry.content: Is there any tool like SAP DART for public cloud?

entry.title: Re: Free of charge invoices with Mexican SAT
entry.content: Check first with customer/company's tax advisor

Hello Rizu,

Thanks for showing your interest in the event. Looking forward to seeing you on the event day!

We also request your support to spread the word about the event with your colleagues (especially the ones based in and around Delhi NCR region)

Best regards,

Jitan Batra

2.Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field.

entry.title: Re: Free of charge invoices with Mexican SAT
entry.content: (on a techninal pov) Did you find and read notes such as 2333641 - CFDI Mexico: Customizing Invoice line amount calculation and 1365263 - Free of charge items in digital invoices in Mexico (XX-CSC-MX)

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content: This app is made with fiori elements

entry.title: Re: how to set up PMR automatically when Production order...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please refer to OSS note - 

3133948 - How to trigger the automatic EWM staging upon the production order release

Resolution

Since the "Posting Change Item" is a kind of "Delivery", if you want to trigger automatic EWM staging, you have to set the "WM Request" field of the Production Scheduling Profile as "2 - Transfer Reqmt, Transfer Order, and Delivery Upon Release".

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: Thanks but I am then uable to set the property using this namespace variable. Below is the code

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: <xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:sapci="http://sap.com/it/" exclude-result-prefixes="sapci"> <xsl:param name="exchange"/> <xsl:param name="nspace"/> <xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::*"/> <xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', $nspace)"/> <!-- <xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', 'Testing 1-2-3')"/> --> <message>Hello, world!</message> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content: In this case, this application consumes a view with Fiori Elements So, when I modify the Fiori Elements, should I modify the view?

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: Ryan - Any idea how do I assign nspace variable to MyProperty

entry.title: Password policy update on SAP netweaver
entry.content:
Hi all, anyone could answer this. If I apply a new password policy in SAP NetWeaver such as the minimum password length, expiration time, password history size, and maximum idle time, it will have affect in any integrated systems users like those using the CUST_USER_ADMIN_ROLE that access the HANA database, etc?

Does it force to update their own password?

Thank you,

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: Re: BW Hierarchies and Flattening in BW via ABAP
entry.content: Can we change hierarchy Dynamically instead of fixed hierarchy

entry.title: Procurement 2025 - Through the looking glass 🔎
entry.content:
Discover the pivotal trends 💫 and insights revolutionizing procurement today and shaping its future, exclusively in our live stream.

Discover how SAP Ariba is addressing these evolving needs with innovative solutions. Corinna and Gordon will explore the drivers of digitalization, upcoming tech trends identified by research, and strategies on how Procurement leaders can align to elevate the function within their business.

📢Don't miss this opportunity to stay ahead in the rapidly changing world of procurement.

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content: Hi. Recently we updated the Build Service UI. The limits on Builds are intended for Free Tier (NOT the free edition/Community edition). This is a bug and we are working on a fix now.

entry.title: IA38 Mass change not working
entry.content:
Hello,

we want to use IA38 to change the purchase group for some task list operations. We mark the lines (see screenshot1.jpg) and then we select "Goto -> Mass change -> Change task list operation". But we got an information that task list is not current, update table (see screenshot2.jpg).

Has anyone any idea why this mass transaction does not work?

Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: Re: Harness the Power of Generative AI for Enterprise Automation!
entry.content: Do not miss our sessions at SAP TechEd!

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: @Bhaven you have declared nspace as both a parameter and a variable, I would remove the parameter reference since you are using it as a variable here.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @Tunir,

Currently we have classic and optimized stories created in our tenant and planning to convert classic stories to optimized one.

Is there any way to get list of all classic stories present in tenant? I checked existing SAC usage and Resource models but there is no field which can help to identify if the story is classic or optimized.

Regards,

Vivek
